detailed_description: Removal of all vegetation, trees, stumps, roots, and debris from the project site including disposal of cleared materials. Used for initial site preparation before any earthwork begins. Measured per hectare of cleared area.

Demolition and removal of existing structures, pavements, fences, utilities, and other obstructions within the right-of-way. Includes hauling and disposal offsite. Measured as lump sum per structure or obstruction removed.

Structural concrete with 28-day compressive strength of 20.7 MPa (3000 psi), Class A mix design per DPWH Spec. Includes batching, mixing, placing, vibrating, and curing. Used for structural members: footings, columns, beams, and slabs. Measured per cubic meter in-place.

Structural concrete with 28-day compressive strength of 16.5 MPa (2400 psi), Class B mix. Less cement-intensive than Class A; used for mass concrete elements, non-critical structural fills, and bedding. Measured per cubic meter in-place.

Structural concrete with 28-day compressive strength of 13.8 MPa (2000 psi), Class C mix. Minimum structural grade; used for blinding layers, leveling courses, and non-load-bearing elements. Measured per cubic meter. Not suitable as primary structural concrete.

Lean concrete mix (low cement, high filler ratio) placed as working mat or leveling course under structural foundations. Provides clean working surface and prevents contamination of structural concrete. Measured per cubic meter; typically 50-75mm thick.

Plain (unreinforced) Portland cement concrete pavement 150mm thick. Includes forming, placing, finishing, curing, and joint installation per DPWH Spec. Used for light-traffic areas, pathways, and service roads. Measured per square meter.

Plain concrete pavement 200mm thick for medium-traffic roads and parking areas. Thicker than 902(1) for higher wheel loads. Includes transverse contraction joints at 4-5m spacing. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of temporary timber and plywood formwork system to retain concrete during placement. Includes lumber, plywood, form ties, and stripping after curing. Measured per square meter of formed concrete surface.

description: Masonry, Split Face Concrete Hollow Blocks
detailed_description: Construction of split-face concrete hollow block (CHB) masonry wall with visible textured face. Includes CHB units, mortar, and reinforcement placement per DPWH Spec. Measured per square meter of wall face.

Supply, cutting, bending, and placing Grade 33 (230 MPa yield) mild steel deformed bars. Includes wire ties and chairs. Primarily used for stirrups, ties, temperature bars, and light structural members. Measured per kilogram.
Supply, cutting, bending, placing, and tying Grade 40 (275 MPa yield) standard deformed bars. Most common rebar grade; used for footings, columns, beams, slabs, and walls. Measured per kilogram.

Supply, cutting, bending, placing, and tying Grade 60 (415 MPa yield) high-strength deformed bars. Used in seismic-resistant structures and heavily loaded members where larger bar sizes would impair constructability. Measured per kilogram.

Supply and driving of prestressed concrete piles including casting, curing, transport, and driving with hydraulic hammer. Used where bearing capacity cannot be achieved by other pile types. Measured per linear meter driven.
Supply and installation of metal deck sheets as permanent formwork for composite concrete slabs. Includes decking panels, end closures, and shear connectors. Measured per square meter of floor area.

Fabrication, erection, and primer painting of standard structural steel members (angles, channels, plates). Includes shop fabrication, transport, field erection, and bolting or welding connections. Measured per kilogram of steel.

Fabrication, erection, and primer painting of high-strength structural steel (A572 Gr.50 or equivalent). Used where reduced member sizes are required. Measured per kilogram; requires pre-qualified welding procedures.

Supply, installation, and extraction of steel sheet piles (U-section or Z-section) for permanent or temporary retaining walls, cofferdams, and cut-off walls. Includes handling and driving. Measured per linear meter of pile.
Application of waterproofing membrane or coating system to concrete surfaces. Specific system type to be confirmed with drawings. Measured per square meter of treated surface.
Supply and installation of wood panel door complete with frame, hinges, lockset, and door stop. Includes solid or hollow-core panel, wood frame, and hardware. Measured per door unit.

Supply and installation of standard aluminum-framed window with glass. Includes frame, glazing, hardware, and sealant. Specific operation type (sliding, awning, or fixed) per drawings. Measured per square meter of window opening.
Complete electrical installation works including conduits, wiring, panels, devices, and fixtures. Lump sum for entire electrical scope on smaller projects. Measured per lot.
Complete plumbing installation works including all supply piping, drainage piping, fittings, and fixtures. Lump sum for entire plumbing scope on smaller projects. Measured per lot.
Complete sanitary works including sewer piping, manholes, septic tank, and connections to public sewer. Lump sum scope; measured per lot.
Complete painting works for building including surface preparation, primer, and finish coats. Lump sum for small projects. Measured per square meter for larger scopes.
Supply and installation of floor tile finish on concrete substrate. Type, size, and pattern per drawings. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of wall tile finish on masonry or concrete wall substrate. Type, size, and pattern per drawings. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of ceiling works including framing, panels, and finishing. Type and suspension system per drawings. Measured per square meter.
Complete site development works including fencing, paving, drainage, and landscaping. Lump sum for small projects. Measured per lot.
Supply and installation of steel roofing sheets on purlin framing. Type, profile, and BMT per specifications. Measured per square meter.

Removal of dense tree cover, large-diameter stumps, and undergrowth in heavily wooded terrain. Requires heavy equipment such as bulldozers and stump grinders. Differentiated from 800(1) by higher density of woody material requiring additional equipment hours per hectare.

Removal of scattered trees, shrubs, and light undergrowth in lightly wooded areas. Less intensive than 800(2); typically accomplished with standard dozer and brush cutter. Measured per hectare of cleared area.

Felling, removal, and disposal of individual trees exceeding 300mm trunk diameter at breast height. Includes stump removal and grubbing. Measured per tree; used when isolated large trees exist outside general clearing areas.

Breaking up and removal of existing plain or reinforced concrete pavement slabs. Includes saw-cutting, hydraulic breaking, loading, and hauling to disposal area. Measured per square meter of pavement surface removed.

Removal of existing asphalt concrete or bituminous pavement layers. Includes cold milling or manual breaking, loading, and hauling. Measured per square meter; differentiated from 801(2) by flexible pavement material.
Demolition and removal of existing masonry walls, footings, or structural concrete elements. Includes manual or mechanical breaking and disposal. Measured per cubic meter of masonry volume removed.
Removal of existing drainage structures including culverts, catch basins, and manholes. Includes excavation, dismantling, and disposal of removed elements. Measured per drainage structure removed.

name: 802(1)a
detailed_description: Excavation of common material (soil, soft ground, gravel) along roadway and drainage alignments. Includes excavation, loading, and hauling to designated spoil areas or embankment. Measured per cubic meter of material in-place.

name: 802(1)b
detailed_description: Excavation of rock material requiring blasting or heavy ripping along roadway and drainage alignments. Includes drilling, blasting, loading, and hauling. Measured per cubic meter; differentiated from 802(1)a by rock classification requiring special methods.

Excavation for structures including footings, pile caps, and foundations. Includes shoring if required and backfill of excess material. Measured per cubic meter of material removed; differentiated from roadway excavation by its localized structural nature.

Excavation of soft, saturated, unstable muck or highly organic material unsuitable for embankment. Includes removal and disposal to spoil area away from embankment. Measured per cubic meter of muck in-place.

Excavation of material from approved borrow pits or quarry sources for use as embankment or fill. Includes extraction, loading, hauling to fill area. Measured per cubic meter of material at borrow source.

Excavation of soft rock material that can be ripped by dozer blade without blasting, along roadway cuts. Includes ripping, loading, and hauling. Differentiated from 802(1)b (hard rock requiring blasting) by rippability criterion.

Excavation of hard rock requiring drilling and blasting along roadway cuts. Includes presplitting, blasting, secondary breaking, loading, and hauling. Requires approved blasting plan per DPWH safety standards.

Placement and compaction of selected fill material around structures including abutments, culverts, and retaining walls. Includes material, placing in 200mm lifts, and compaction to 95% MDD. Measured per cubic meter compacted in-place.

Placement and compaction of approach fill embankment behind bridge abutments. Includes select material, laying in lifts, and compaction. Critical for prevention of approach settlement; requires higher compaction standard than general embankment.

Placement and compaction of clean granular material (gravel or crushed stone) as backfill where drainage is required. Measured per cubic meter compacted in-place; used where cohesive material is not suitable.
Construction of roadway embankment using material excavated from roadway cuts. Includes spreading and compacting in 200mm lifts to 95% MDD per DPWH Spec. Measured per cubic meter of compacted fill.

name: 804(1)a
detailed_description: Construction of embankment using common material (soil, gravel mix) hauled from approved borrow pits. Includes transport, spreading, and compaction. Measured per cubic meter; used when roadway excavation is insufficient to achieve grade.

name: 804(1)b
detailed_description: Construction of embankment using rock or rock-soil mix from borrow. Requires special compaction procedures to fill voids. Measured per cubic meter; differentiated from 804(1)a by material type and compaction methodology.

Compaction of existing or placed embankment material to achieve required density. Includes proof-rolling and re-compaction of substandard areas. Measured per cubic meter; used as standalone item when compaction is separate from placement.

Construction of embankment using select granular material meeting specified gradation for load-bearing applications. Includes sourcing, hauling, and compaction. Measured per cubic meter; used for high-fill or critical sections.

Final compaction of embankment to achieve design density and surface elevation. Includes grading and fine-shaping of embankment surface. Measured per cubic meter of compacted fill; final item confirming compaction acceptance.

Preparation of the subgrade surface by fine-grading, compacting, and proof-rolling to receive base course. Includes trimming to design cross-section and wetting/drying to achieve optimum moisture. Measured per square meter.

name: 806(1)a
detailed_description: Construction of aggregate subbase course by road-mixing imported gravel with in-place material. Includes spreading, mixing, watering, and compacting to 100% MDD. Measured per cubic meter; lower-cost alternative to plant-mix method.

name: 806(1)b
detailed_description: Construction of aggregate subbase course using plant-mixed graded aggregate produced in a mixing plant. Includes hauling, spreading, and compacting. Produces more uniform gradation than road-mix; measured per cubic meter compacted.

Construction of subbase course using gravel or crushed aggregate mixed with Portland cement. Includes mixing, spreading, compacting, and curing. Provides higher strength than untreated aggregate; measured per cubic meter.
Stabilization of subbase using hydrated lime mixed into existing soil or imported material to improve bearing capacity. Measured per cubic meter; used for weak subgrade soils such as expansive clay.

Construction of graded crushed aggregate base course over prepared subbase. Includes spreading, shaping, and compacting to 100% MDD. Measured per cubic meter; primary structural layer between subbase and pavement.

Construction of base course using aggregate mixed with bituminous binder. Provides flexible base layer with higher resistance to rutting than unbound aggregate. Measured per cubic meter compacted in-place.
Construction of base course using recycled crushed concrete aggregate. Includes crushing, grading, and compaction. Environmentally sustainable alternative; measured per cubic meter compacted.

Application of cutback bitumen or emulsified asphalt on prepared base course surface before placing asphalt overlay. Penetrates and seals base; prevents slippage between base and bituminous course. Measured per square meter.

Application of thin bituminous emulsion coat on existing asphalt or concrete surface before placing new overlay. Promotes adhesion between layers; differentiated from prime coat by substrate (existing pavement vs. new aggregate base). Measured per square meter.

description: Bituminous Concrete Surface Course Type I
detailed_description: Placement of dense-graded bituminous concrete surface course Type I (fine-graded) using hot-mix asphalt. Includes mixing, hauling, and compacting at 130-160°C. Provides smooth riding surface; measured per square meter.

description: Bituminous Concrete Surface Course Type II
detailed_description: Placement of bituminous concrete surface course Type II (open-graded or coarser gradation) for improved drainage and skid resistance. Differentiated from Type I by aggregate gradation and surface texture. Measured per square meter.

Placement of hot-mix asphalt concrete pavement including mixing at plant, hauling, spreading, and compacting to specified density. General designation for asphalt works not otherwise specified. Measured per square meter.

Placement of additional asphalt layer over existing pavement to restore profile and improve ride quality. Includes tack coat preparation and compaction. Measured per square meter; requires existing surface to be sound and properly prepared.

Construction of bituminous penetration macadam pavement by spreading coarse aggregate and applying penetrating bitumen in successive applications. Low-cost surfacing used in rural roads. Measured per square meter.

Application of crushed aggregate directly on prepared subbase or base as final wearing course. Used in low-volume rural roads where paved surface is not warranted. Measured per cubic meter of compacted material.

Construction of Portland cement concrete pavement (PCCP) including forming, batching, placing, finishing, and curing. Includes joint installation (transverse and longitudinal). Primary DPWH road pavement type; measured per square meter.

Application of gravel or crushed stone as wearing course on unpaved roads. Includes spreading and shaping to cross-section. Low-cost solution for rural access; requires periodic re-graveling. Measured per cubic meter.
Construction of gabion mattress using wire mesh baskets filled with rock to protect streambanks and slope surfaces from erosion. Typically 0.3m thick; measured per cubic meter of basket volume.

Construction of gabion wall or box using stacked wire mesh baskets filled with rock for retaining or protection structures. Typically 1.0m wide boxes; measured per cubic meter. Differentiated from mattress by greater thickness and vertical stacking.

Supply and installation of geotextile fabric as separator, filter, or reinforcement layer between soil and aggregate. Measured per square meter; applications include subgrade separation, drainage filter, and slope reinforcement.

Installation of soil nail anchors into slope face by drilling, inserting steel bar, and grouting. Each nail includes drilling, steel tendon, and grouting. Measured per soil nail; used for cut slope stabilization.

Installation of soil nail with bearing plate assembly that distributes nail head force over shotcrete facing. Includes nail, grouting, and plate installation. Measured per assembly; provides enhanced load distribution versus plain nail.
Supply and installation of biodegradable or synthetic erosion control matting on slopes to prevent surface erosion until vegetation establishes. Measured per square meter of protected surface area.

Application of hydraulic seeding (hydroseeding) mixture of seed, fertilizer, mulch, and tackifier by pressurized spray on slopes. Promotes rapid vegetation establishment for erosion control. Measured per square meter.
Operation of pumping equipment to remove groundwater from excavation areas during construction. Measured per calendar day of pump operation; includes pump, hose, and operator.

Installation and operation of deep well dewatering system using submersible pumps in drilled wells around excavation perimeter. Measured per day; used for deep excavations where sump pumping is insufficient.

Design, supply, and installation of temporary timber or steel shoring systems to support excavation walls. Measured per square meter of supported face. Differentiated from permanent retaining walls by temporary nature.

Supply, installation, and extraction of steel sheet piles for temporary excavation support. Measured per square meter of pile face; used in waterlogged soils or deep excavations near existing structures.

Placement of controlled low-strength material (CLSM) — a flowable cement-sand-water mixture — as backfill where controlled density is required. Measured per cubic meter; used around utilities and in confined spaces.

Milling or planing of existing asphalt pavement surface to remove deteriorated layer or reduce grade. Measured per square meter; depth of cut specified separately. Required before asphalt overlay to maintain road profile.
Construction of stone base course using large-size broken stone compacted to form rigid base. Measured per cubic meter; used in areas with poor subgrade requiring high-strength base.
Placement and compaction of clean sand as bedding material under pipes, culverts, or structures. Measured per cubic meter; provides uniform support and prevents point loading on buried elements.
Supply and installation of geogrid reinforcement within embankment or base course to improve load distribution and reduce settlement. Measured per square meter of geogrid layer.
In-situ stabilization of subgrade soil by mixing lime into the top layer to improve bearing capacity and reduce plasticity. Measured per square meter; used on expansive or weak clay subgrades.
Fine-grading and leveling of site using motor grader to achieve design surface elevations. Measured per square meter; preparatory work before paving, landscaping, or building construction.

Supply, hauling, and compaction of approved borrow fill material from offsite source to achieve design grades. Measured per cubic meter compacted in-place; used when site excavation material is insufficient or unsuitable.
Conduct of laboratory compaction testing (proctor test, field density test) on earthwork layers. Includes sampling, testing, and reporting per DPWH specification. Measured per test performed.

High-strength structural concrete at 40 MPa (5800 psi) 28-day strength, Class AA. Requires high cement content and low water-cement ratio. Used for special structures such as bridges, high-rise columns, and seismic-critical elements. Measured per cubic meter.

Structural concrete at 14 MPa 28-day strength, Class D. Lean mix for subbase application under pavement slabs. Differentiated from Class C by slightly lower strength; used where only surface protection of subgrade is needed. Measured per cubic meter.

Ready-mixed concrete supplied from a batching plant and placed in-situ. Includes supply, delivery, pumping or chuting, placing, and vibrating. Used when on-site mixing is impractical. Strength class specified in drawings; measured per cubic meter.

Repair of deteriorated or damaged concrete surfaces by removing defective material and patching with repair mortar or micro-concrete. Includes surface preparation, bonding agent, and curing. Measured per square meter of repaired area.

Lean concrete subbase placed under rigid pavement slabs as stable, uniform support layer. Typically 100mm thick at approximately 7 MPa strength. Prevents erosion of subgrade and acts as working platform. Measured per cubic meter.
Flowable, self-leveling low-strength fill placed in confined areas such as abandoned utilities or voids. Similar to CLSM; includes cement, fly ash, and water. Measured per cubic meter.

Reinforced concrete pavement with steel mesh or rebar, typically 200-250mm thick. Handles heavier loads with fewer joints than plain concrete. Includes forming, reinforcement placing, concrete, finishing, and curing. Measured per square meter.
Plain concrete pavement 250mm thick for heavy-duty industrial or truck loading areas. Greater thickness reduces joint spacing requirements. Measured per square meter.

Plain concrete pavement 300mm thick for very heavy-duty port, industrial, or major highway applications. Maximum standard thickness for plain concrete; may substitute reinforced concrete. Measured per square meter.

Installation of tubular steel centering (scaffolding and shoring) to support formwork during concrete casting of elevated slabs and beams. Measured per square meter of supported area; load-bearing steel system.

Supply and installation of reusable steel panel formwork system for concrete walls, columns, and slabs. Higher initial cost but multiple reuses reduce unit cost. Measured per square meter of formed surface.

Supply and installation of plywood-faced formwork panels for architectural-grade concrete finish. Includes marine ply, form oil, and timber framing. Measured per square meter; produces smoother finish than lumber formwork.

Construction of 100mm-thick non-load-bearing concrete hollow block partition wall. Includes mortar joint finishing, reinforcement at corners and jambs. Measured per square meter; used for interior partitions.

Construction of 150mm-thick non-load-bearing CHB partition wall. Heavier and more sound-resistant than 100mm block. Includes mortar and reinforcement. Measured per square meter; used where greater mass is required.

Slope protection using dry-laid Class A riprap (large quarried stones) placed on slope face. Stone size typically 200-300kg each. Provides erosion protection for embankment slopes and streambanks. Measured per cubic meter.

Slope protection using riprap stones grouted with cement mortar for permanent, stable facing. More durable than dry riprap; prevents stone displacement. Measured per cubic meter of grouted riprap in-place.

Slope protection using precast or cast-in-place articulated concrete blocks interlocked to form flexible erosion-resistant mat. Allows drainage through joints. Measured per square meter of protected slope face.

Construction of cast-in-place concrete curb and gutter assembly along road edge. Includes forming, concrete placement, and finishing. Standard DPWH road furniture; provides edge restraint and stormwater channeling. Measured per linear meter.

Installation of extruded concrete curb and gutter using slipform paver. Faster than cast-in-place; used on long straight road sections. Measured per linear meter; differentiated from 906(1) by construction method.
Construction of concrete curb only (without gutter) along road or parking edge. Provides vehicle containment and edge restraint. Measured per linear meter; used where drainage is handled separately.
Construction of precast or cast-in-place concrete Jersey barrier along road median. F-shaped profile deflects vehicles; measured per linear meter. Used on national highways and expressways.
Construction of plain concrete sidewalk along roads or around buildings. Includes forming, placing, and smooth-trowel finishing. Measured per square meter; standard pedestrian walkway surface.

Construction of concrete sidewalk with broom finish texture for improved skid resistance. Process is identical to 908(1) but with broom drag across fresh concrete surface. Preferred in outdoor and wet exposure locations.
Construction of V-shaped concrete gutter along road edge to collect and convey surface runoff. Measured per square meter of gutter surface area; shallower and wider than curb-and-gutter.
Construction of concrete-lined irrigation or drainage canal. Includes subgrade preparation, concrete lining, and joint sealing. Measured per square meter of lining surface.
Supply and installation of 450mm diameter reinforced concrete pipe (RCP) culvert including bedding, laying, and jointing. Used for minor road drainage crossings. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 600mm diameter RC pipe culvert including bedding, joint gaskets, and headwalls. Handles moderate drainage flows. Measured per linear meter; larger than 910(1).
Supply and installation of 900mm diameter RC pipe culvert for major drainage crossings. Includes Class III pipe, rubber-gasket joints, and compacted bedding. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 1200mm diameter RC pipe culvert for large drainage crossings. Heavy Class IV pipe; typically requires crane for installation. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 1500mm diameter RC pipe culvert for very large drainage flows. Requires special bedding and headwall treatment. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 600mm diameter corrugated metal pipe (CMP) culvert. Lighter and easier to install than RC pipe; suitable for temporary or low-fill situations. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 900mm diameter corrugated metal pipe culvert. Includes bituminous coating for corrosion protection. Measured per linear meter; used where RC pipe is impractical.

Construction of cast-in-place reinforced concrete box culvert 1.0m x 1.0m (span x rise) for road drainage crossing. Includes excavation, formwork, concrete, and backfill. Measured per linear meter of barrel.
Construction of RC box culvert 1.5m x 1.5m for medium drainage crossings. Higher capacity than 911(1); requires heavier reinforcement. Measured per linear meter of culvert barrel.
Construction of RC box culvert 2.0m x 2.0m for large drainage crossings equivalent to small bridges. Measured per linear meter; requires specialized forming equipment.
Construction of RC box culvert 2.0m wide x 1.5m rise for wide but shallow drainage channels. Measured per linear meter; differentiated from 911(3) by non-square cross-section.
Construction of RC box culvert 3.0m x 2.0m for major drainage crossings. Used where bridge is not warranted but large flow area is needed. Measured per linear meter.

Supply and driving of 250mm square precast prestressed concrete piles. Includes casting, transportation, and driving with hydraulic hammer. Allowable capacity approximately 400-600 kN. Measured per linear meter driven.
Supply and driving of 300mm square precast prestressed concrete piles. Higher capacity than 250mm square; allowable load approximately 600-900 kN. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and driving of 350mm square precast prestressed concrete piles for heavy structural foundations. Allowable capacity 900-1200 kN. Measured per linear meter of pile driven.

Construction of 400mm diameter cast-in-place concrete pile by drilling borehole and placing reinforced concrete. Includes drilling, reinforcement cage, and concrete. Suitable for restricted access sites. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of 600mm diameter cast-in-place concrete pile for heavier structural loads. Includes drilling, casing if required, reinforcement, and concrete placement. Measured per linear meter.

Construction of 600mm diameter drilled shaft (bored pile) for bridge or structural foundations. Includes rotary drilling, temporary casing, reinforcement cage, and tremie concrete. Allowable load 1500-2500 kN. Measured per linear meter.

Construction of 800mm diameter drilled shaft for heavy bridge or building foundations. Includes full-depth drilling, reinforcement, and concrete. Higher capacity than 600mm shaft. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of reinforced concrete pile cap connecting pile heads to the structure above. Includes excavation, reinforcement, forming, and concrete. Measured per cubic meter of concrete in pile cap.

Construction of reinforced concrete grade beam connecting pile caps or spread footings at grade level. Includes forming, reinforcement, and concrete. Measured per cubic meter; provides lateral load transfer between foundations.

Construction of reinforced concrete raft (mat) foundation as single continuous slab under building. Includes reinforcement mesh, concrete, and waterproofing. Measured per cubic meter; used where column loads are high and soil bearing is low.

Construction of reinforced concrete retaining wall including footing, stem, and shear key. Includes forming, reinforcement, and concrete. Measured per cubic meter of concrete; used to retain earth at grade changes.

Construction of concrete headwall and wingwall at culvert inlet and outlet. Directs flow into culvert, prevents scour, and retains embankment. Includes forming, reinforcement, and concrete. Measured per cubic meter.

Construction of 100mm-thick load-bearing concrete hollow block wall with reinforcement at vertical cells per structural plans. Includes CHB, mortar, and grout. Measured per square meter; used for load-bearing exterior walls.
Construction of 150mm-thick load-bearing CHB wall. Greater structural capacity than 100mm; used for taller or more heavily loaded walls. Measured per square meter.
Construction of 200mm-thick CHB wall for structural applications. Heaviest standard CHB size; used for large span or high-load situations. Measured per square meter.

Construction of rubble stone masonry using quarried stone laid in mortar without cut facing. Includes foundation excavation, stone selection, laying, and mortar. Measured per cubic meter; used for retaining walls and canal linings.

Construction of rubble concrete combining rough stone with concrete matrix. Stones embedded in concrete reduce cement consumption. Measured per cubic meter; used for massive gravity retaining walls and footings.
Supply and installation of precast concrete fence panels between posts. Includes panels, post-setting, and capping. Measured per square meter of fence face; provides durable boundary enclosure.
Supply and installation of standard precast concrete beam element for building or bridge construction. Includes casting, transport, and erection with crane. Measured per linear meter of beam.

Supply and installation of concrete interlocking block paving on compacted sand bed. Includes sand bedding, block laying, and joint sand filling. Measured per square meter; used for driveways, parking, and pedestrian areas.
Construction of concrete catch basin for surface drainage collection. Includes reinforced concrete box, grate, and inlet connections. Measured per unit; size and type specified in drawings.
Construction of concrete manhole for sewer or storm drain access. Includes base slab, precast or cast-in-place rings, manhole frame and cover. Measured per unit; depth affects cost.
Construction of concrete headwall at culvert inlet or outlet as standalone unit. Includes forming, reinforcement, and concrete. Measured per unit; used for smaller culverts not requiring wingwalls.
Supply and installation of precast concrete T-beam for bridge deck construction. Includes casting at precast yard, transport, erection, and connecting diaphragms. Measured per linear meter of beam.

Supply and installation of Type I prestressed concrete beam (smallest I-beam section) for short-span bridges. Includes prestressing tendons, casting, curing, transport, and erection. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of Type II prestressed concrete beam (medium section) for medium-span bridges up to 20m. Heavier than Type I; requires heavier crane for erection. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of Type III prestressed concrete beam (large section) for longer spans up to 30m. Used on national highway bridges. Measured per linear meter; heaviest standard PSC beam type.
Supply and installation of precast concrete deck panels placed between bridge beams to form deck. Includes topping slab connection. Measured per square meter of deck area.
Supply and installation of precast concrete Jersey barrier segments along roads or bridges. Includes setting with crane and connecting pins. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of precast U-shaped concrete drain channel. Includes bedding, setting, and jointing. Measured per linear meter; used for roadside drainage and site drainage channels.

Injection of cement grout under pressure into voids, cracks, or loose foundation soils for stabilization or void filling. Measured per injection point; used for structure repair and ground improvement.

Application of shotcrete (pneumatically applied concrete) on slope face for stabilization and erosion protection. Includes surface preparation, wire mesh anchoring, and spray application. Measured per square meter.

Placement of concrete with added steel or polypropylene fibers to improve tensile strength and crack resistance. Fiber dosage typically 30-50 kg/m³. Measured per cubic meter; used for industrial floors and tunnel linings.
Installation of pre-formed filler and sealant in concrete pavement expansion joints. Includes joint cutting, cleaning, backer rod, and sealant application. Measured per linear meter of joint length.
Installation of pre-molded bituminous or cork filler strip in concrete pavement contraction or construction joints before concrete is placed. Measured per linear meter.

Construction of reinforced concrete bridge abutment including footing, wing walls, and bridge seat. Includes forming, reinforcement, concrete, and backfill. Measured per cubic meter of concrete in abutment.
Construction of reinforced concrete bridge pier including footing and column. Includes pile cap, shaft, pier cap forming, reinforcement, and concrete. Measured per cubic meter.
Construction of cast-in-place reinforced concrete bridge deck slab over beams. Includes forming, reinforcement, concrete, and drainage. Measured per cubic meter of deck slab concrete.
Construction of concrete diaphragm or cross-beam connecting adjacent bridge beams for lateral load distribution. Includes forming, reinforcement, and concrete. Measured per cubic meter.
Supply and installation of precast reinforced concrete frame (post and beam units). Includes casting, transport, erection, and grouting connections. Measured per unit or frame set.
Construction of concrete septic tank with inlet, outlet, and access cover. Includes forming, reinforcement, concrete, and waterproofing. Measured per unit; capacity specified in drawings.
Construction of reinforced concrete water cistern or storage tank. Includes waterproof concrete mix, reinforcement, forming, and roof slab. Measured per unit; capacity specified.
Supply and installation of precast concrete slope protection units (blocks, panels) for streambank or embankment protection. Includes setting on prepared slope. Measured per square meter.
Construction of concrete lining to irrigation or drainage channel walls and invert. Includes subgrade trimming, forming, concrete, and joints. Measured per square meter of lined surface.
Construction of concrete with exposed architectural finish (bush-hammered, sandblasted, or board-formed). Requires special formwork and finishing. Measured per square meter of finished surface.
Placement of self-compacting concrete (SCC) requiring no vibration; flows into complex forms under its own weight. Used for congested reinforcement or difficult access. Measured per cubic meter.

Supply, cutting, bending, placing, and tying Grade 75 (520 MPa yield) high-strength steel bars. Used in specialized seismic-resistant or high-rise construction. Requires special coupler or weld procedures. Measured per kilogram.

Supply and driving of 300mm diameter spun (centrifugally cast) prestressed concrete piles. Hollow section reduces weight while maintaining capacity. Measured per linear meter; common in building foundations in soft soil.
Supply and driving of 400mm diameter spun concrete piles for heavier building or industrial foundations. Greater capacity than 300mm diameter spun piles. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of composite metal decking with 50mm rib depth for standard floor slabs. Includes decking, sidelap fasteners, and shear studs. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of composite metal decking with 75mm rib depth for longer spans between beams. Higher rib allows reduced concrete volume over longer spans. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of M20 anchor bolts embedded in concrete for structural steel base plate connections. Includes anchor bolt, template, and setting. Measured per bolt installed.
Supply and installation of M24 anchor bolts for heavier structural steel connections. Larger diameter provides greater pull-out and shear resistance than M20. Measured per bolt.
Supply and installation of M30 anchor bolts for heavy equipment or major structural connections. Requires heavier concrete embedment and template. Measured per bolt.

Supply and driving of 219mm outside diameter steel pipe pile by hydraulic impact hammer. Includes pipe pile, end plate, and driving. Used where soil conditions favor pipe over concrete piles. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and driving of 318mm OD steel pipe pile. Higher capacity than 219mm; used for heavier column loads. Measured per linear meter driven.
Supply and driving of HP250 steel H-pile section. H-section displaces less soil than pipe pile; preferred in dense urban areas. Measured per linear meter.

description: Bored Piles with Permanent Steel Casing
detailed_description: Construction of bored pile with permanent steel casing left in-place for ground stability in loose or waterlogged soil. Includes drilling, casing, reinforcement, and concrete. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of 100mm diameter micropile by drilling and grouting high-strength steel bar in small-diameter borehole. Used in restricted access areas or for underpinning. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of 150mm diameter micropile providing higher capacity than 100mm. Includes drilling, centralized bar, and pressure grouting. Measured per linear meter.

Supply and installation of post-tensioning tendons (strands, ducts, and anchorages) in prestressed concrete beams or slabs. Includes stressing after concrete cures. Measured per kilogram of tendon steel.
Supply and installation of post-tensioning anchorage assemblies (bearing plates, wedge plates, and caps) at tendon ends. Measured per anchorage unit; critical component of post-tensioned system.
Supply, cutting, bending, and placing deformed bar stirrups and column ties. Includes wiring and assembly into cages. Measured per kilogram; represents discrete pay item for shear reinforcement.

Supply and installation of welded wire mesh 100x100mm grid with 10 gauge wire in both directions. Placed in slabs-on-grade and concrete pavement as crack control reinforcement. Measured per square meter.
Supply and placement of welded wire fabric (WWF) as slab reinforcement. Includes unrolling, lapping, and securing. Measured per square meter; faster to install than loose bars for large slab areas.

Supply and mixing of steel fiber into concrete mix for crack control and enhanced toughness. Added at batching plant at dosage of 30-60 kg/m³. Measured per kilogram; used in industrial floors and tunnel linings.
Supply and mixing of polypropylene fibers into concrete for plastic shrinkage crack control. Added at low dosage (0.6-1.0 kg/m³). Measured per kilogram; improves early-age performance.
Supply and installation of mechanical rebar coupler (threaded sleeve) for bar-to-bar connection without lap splice. Eliminates congestion at splice zones. Measured per coupler installed.
Supply, cutting, and placing continuous spiral (helix) reinforcement in circular concrete columns for confinement and ductility. Includes spiral wire and ties. Measured per kilogram.

Supply and installation of chemical anchor bolt by drilling hole in hardened concrete, injecting epoxy capsule, and setting threaded rod. Used for post-installed connections. Measured per anchor installed.

Butt welding of reinforcing bars using shielded metal arc welding (SMAW) or flash-butt welding. Requires qualified welder and weld inspection. Measured per weld joint; used for bars where lapping or couplers are impractical.
Fabrication, delivery, erection, and connection of wide flange (WF/I) steel sections for framing systems. Includes column splices, beam connections, and primer coat. Measured per kilogram.
Supply and installation of light gauge steel framing (LSF) members (studs, tracks, and accessories). Used for non-load-bearing partitions or light structural framing. Measured per kilogram of LSF.

Fabrication and erection of welded steel plate girder for bridges or long-span structures. Includes shop welding, inspection, transport, and field erection. Measured per kilogram of fabricated girder.
Fabrication and erection of welded steel box girder for bridges. Closed section provides superior torsional stiffness. Measured per kilogram; requires more complex shop fabrication than plate girder.
Supply and driving of HP200 steel H-pile section. Standard section used for building and bridge pile foundations in medium soil conditions. Measured per linear meter driven.
Supply and driving of Universal Pile (UP) steel section, heavier than HP series. Used for high-capacity pile foundations. Measured per linear meter.

Supply and installation of corrugated metal deck sheets on roof purlins. Includes panels, laps, and fasteners. Measured per square meter; serves as roof cladding and minor structural spanning element.
Supply and installation of metal deck floor system as formwork and tensile reinforcement for composite floor slabs. Measured per square meter; excludes topping concrete.

Erection, use, and dismantling of tubular steel scaffolding for access and support during construction. Measured per square meter of scaffolded surface; includes standards, ledgers, transoms, and base plates.

Erection and operation of mast-climbing work platform (MCWP) for facade or high-level construction work. Measured per square meter of working platform; more efficient than tube-and-coupler for high-rise work.
Supply and installation of steel bar grating with 25x3mm bearing bars on support frames. Provides open-grid flooring for industrial platforms and drains. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of heavy-duty steel grating with 30x5mm bearing bars for heavier loading. Used in industrial floors, vehicle inspection pits, and drainage covers. Measured per square meter.

Supply and erection of pre-engineered metal building (PEB) including primary steel frame, purlins, girts, and roof/wall cladding. Turnkey building system from manufacturer. Measured per square meter of building floor area.
Supply and erection of PEB mezzanine floor extension within existing PEB structure. Includes secondary framing, decking, and connection to main frame. Measured per square meter of added floor area.
Fabrication and erection of steel roof truss including chord members, web members, and connections. Includes shop fabrication, transport, and crane erection. Measured per kilogram of truss steel.
Fabrication and erection of steel floor or bridge truss with heavier members and connection plates. Includes shop assembly and field splice connections. Measured per kilogram.
Supply and installation of steel column base plate with anchor bolt holes. Includes plate, leveling nut, and grout under plate. Measured per unit; connects steel column to concrete foundation.
Fabrication and installation of steel staircase including stringers, treads, and handrail. Includes shop fabrication, anti-slip nosing, and primer. Measured per staircase unit.
Fabrication and installation of steel handrail and balustrade system along stairs, walkways, and platforms. Includes top rail, intermediate rail, and posts. Measured per linear meter.
Fabrication and installation of steel angle bracing members for lateral resistance in structural frames. Includes fabrication, bolted connections, and primer. Measured per kilogram.

Supply and installation of high-strength A325 structural bolts for steel-to-steel connections. Includes bolt, nut, and washers. Measured per bolt installed; snug-tightened or fully pretensioned as specified.
Fabrication, supply, and installation of miscellaneous structural steel items (brackets, embed plates, lintels, ladders). Includes fabrication and primer coat. Measured per kilogram.

Application of shop-applied anti-corrosion primer on structural steel surfaces before delivery to site. Includes surface preparation (Sa 2.5 blast cleaning) and primer coat application. Measured per square meter.

Hot-dip galvanizing of fabricated steel components for long-term corrosion protection. Parts immersed in molten zinc bath at 450°C. Measured per kilogram of steel galvanized; used for outdoor or exposed elements.
Fabrication and installation of seismically designed moment frame connection between column and beam. Includes weld access hole preparation, CJP welds, and inspection. Measured per connection.
Supply and erection of steel mezzanine floor structure including framing, decking, and stairs. Measured per square meter of mezzanine floor area; installed within existing building.
Fabrication and installation of steel pipe railing using Schedule 40 pipe posts and rails. Includes posts, rails, and base plates. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of overhead door frame assembly for roll-up or sliding industrial doors. Includes steel frame, guides, and header. Measured per unit.

Application of torch-applied SBS-modified bituminous membrane waterproofing on concrete roof slabs or foundations. Membrane is heat-fused to substrate using propane torch; 3-4mm thick. Measured per square meter.

Application of self-adhesive SBS/APP bituminous membrane waterproofing. Cold-applied by peeling backing and pressing to primed surface. Suitable for areas where torch is restricted. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of EPDM (ethylene propylene diene monomer) rubber membrane waterproofing. Single-ply membrane 1.2-1.5mm thick; adhered or mechanically fastened. Used for flat roofs and large deck areas. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of TPO or PVC single-ply waterproofing membrane. Heat-welded seams provide reliable watertight joints. Used for commercial roofs and planter decks. Measured per square meter.

Application of crystalline cementitious waterproofing coating on concrete surfaces. Active chemicals penetrate and block capillary pores. Applied in 2 coats at 1.0-1.5 kg/m²; self-sealing at hairline cracks. Measured per square meter.

Supply and mixing of crystalline waterproofing admixture into concrete mix at batching plant. Waterproofs concrete from within; active crystals remain dormant until water exposure. Measured per cubic meter of treated concrete.

Supply and installation of 200mm-wide PVC waterstop embedded at concrete construction joints in water-retaining structures. Dumbbell or centerbulb profile; prevents water passage through joint. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of rubber dumbbell-type waterstop at concrete joints. More flexible than PVC; suitable for joints with anticipated movement. Measured per linear meter.

Application of flexible 2-component cementitious waterproofing (polymer-modified) in 2 coats on wet areas, planter boxes, and basement walls. Flexible grade accommodates minor structural movement. Measured per square meter.
Application of rigid cementitious waterproofing coat on below-grade or water-contact surfaces. Non-flexible; suitable for foundations and water tanks without movement. Measured per square meter.

Application of liquid-applied polyurethane waterproofing membrane on flat roofs, balconies, and wet areas. Applied in 2-3 coats at 1.5-2.0mm DFT. Seamless, UV-stable, and trafficable when topped. Measured per square meter.

Supply and application of polyurethane joint sealant in movement joints between concrete elements. Includes joint preparation, backer rod, and sealant application. Measured per linear meter of sealed joint.
Supply and application of structural silicone sealant for curtain wall glazing and facade joints. High movement accommodation; UV resistant. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 1.5mm thick HDPE geomembrane liner for waterproofing ponds, lagoons, or below-grade structures. Includes welded seams and anchoring. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of aluminum sliding window with double-track frame and overlapping panels. Suitable for wide openings; easy to operate. Includes aluminum frame, 5mm clear glass, and hardware. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of aluminum awning window with top-hung sash that opens outward. Allows ventilation even in light rain. Measured per square meter; preferred in humid Philippine climate.
Supply and installation of fixed aluminum window frame with non-operable glass pane. Used for natural lighting without ventilation. Measured per square meter.

Fabrication and installation of metal (G.I. sheet or tubular steel) door frame. Includes frame, anchor clips, and grouting into masonry. Measured per unit; provides durable alternative to wood frames.
Supply and installation of hollow metal door frame (pressed steel, 18-gauge) with reinforced hinges and strike locations. Heavier duty than sheet metal frame; measured per unit.
Supply and installation of manual sliding or rolling gate on rail track. Includes steel gate panel, rollers, track, and guide post. Measured per gate unit.
Supply and installation of motorized sliding gate with electric motor, limit switches, and remote control. Includes all components of manual gate plus motor drive assembly. Measured per gate unit.
Supply and installation of aluminum curtain wall system for building facade. Includes aluminum mullions, transoms, structural silicone, and glazing. Measured per square meter of curtain wall area.

Supply and installation of 12mm tempered glass in frames or as structural glazing. Includes glass, edge polishing, and setting blocks. Measured per square meter; used for shower screens, railings, and shopfronts.

Supply and installation of laminated safety glass (two glass layers with PVB interlayer). Holds together when broken; used for overhead glazing, skylights, and impact-rated applications. Measured per square meter.
Supply, cutting, and installation of rough lumber framing for non-structural applications. Includes nailers, blocking, and backing for fixtures. Measured per square meter of supported area.
Supply and installation of solid hardwood strip flooring nailed to subfloor. Includes acclimatization, tongue-and-groove laying, and sanding/finishing. Measured per square meter of finished floor.
Supply and installation of engineered wood flooring (plywood core with hardwood veneer). More dimensionally stable than solid wood; click or glue installation. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 9mm plywood panel partition on metal stud frame. Includes studs, plywood both sides, and joint taping. Measured per square meter of partition face.

Supply and installation of FRP (fiberglass reinforced plastic) wall panel for wet areas, food processing, and chemical-resistant applications. Includes adhesive or mechanical fastening. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of FD60 fire-rated door (60-minute rating) with fire-rated frame, intumescent strip, and door closer. Includes certificate of compliance. Measured per door unit.
Supply and installation of FD30 fire-rated door (30-minute rating) for internal fire compartmentation. Lighter duty than FD60; includes rated frame and hardware. Measured per door unit.
Supply and installation of steel access door and frame for concealed access to utility spaces. Includes flush panel, piano hinge, and cam latch. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of manual overhead coiling door (roll-up) for warehouse or garage openings. Includes curtain, guides, spring counterbalance, and lock. Measured per door unit.
Supply and installation of motorized overhead coiling door with electric motor, limit switches, and wall controls. Includes all components of manual version plus motor drive. Measured per door unit.
Supply and installation of aluminum bi-fold door with multiple panels that fold to one side. Used for large openings connecting indoor and outdoor spaces. Measured per unit.

Supply and installation of solid core flush door (smooth face both sides) on wood or metal frame. Higher acoustic rating than hollow core; suitable for offices and conference rooms. Measured per door unit.

Supply and installation of aluminum louver window with adjustable glass blades. Maximizes ventilation; commonly used in residential and light commercial buildings in the Philippines. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of food-grade stainless steel door and frame (SS304). Corrosion-resistant and hygienic; required in food processing and pharmaceutical facilities. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of automatic sliding door with motion sensor, drive motor, and safety edge. Used at building entrances and high-traffic areas. Measured per door unit.
Supply and installation of modular kitchen cabinet system with carcase, doors, drawers, and hardware. Measured per linear meter of cabinet run; excludes countertop.
Supply and installation of built-in wardrobe or storage unit with doors, shelves, and hanging rails. Custom-fabricated to space. Measured per unit or compartment.
Supply and installation of G.I. sheet louver panel on ventilation openings. Includes framing, GI louver blades, and bird screen. Measured per square meter of louver opening.

Installation of extra-low voltage (ELV) data and communication systems including structured cabling, data outlets, and patch panels. Includes Cat6 cabling, faceplate outlets, and cable management. Measured per lot.

Supply and installation of 20mm diameter PVC conduit for branch circuit wiring. Used in embedded (in-slab or in-wall) applications for lighting and convenience outlet circuits. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 32mm PVC conduit for larger branch circuits or sub-feeder runs. Used embedded or surface-mounted for circuits with higher wire count. Measured per linear meter.

Supply and installation of 25mm rigid galvanized steel (GS) conduit for exposed installations in mechanical or electrical rooms. Provides mechanical protection and EMI shielding. Measured per linear meter.

Supply and installation of 25mm EMT (electrical metallic tubing) for semi-exposed wiring in dry locations. Lighter than rigid steel; suitable for visible runs in finished spaces. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 50mm PVC conduit for sub-feeder or multiple circuit runs. Used in-slab or underground for larger conductor bundles. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 63mm HDPE conduit for underground electrical service entries and duct banks. Smooth bore reduces pulling friction; suitable for direct burial. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and pulling of THHN 3.5mm² (12 AWG) conductor in conduit. Used for general branch circuits (15-20A lighting and receptacle circuits). Measured per linear meter of conductor.
Supply and pulling of THHN 5.5mm² (10 AWG) conductor. Used for 20-30A branch circuits, small equipment, and dedicated appliance outlets. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and pulling of THHN 8.0mm² (8 AWG) conductor. Used for 40-50A circuits and sub-feeder runs to subpanels. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and pulling of THHN 14mm² (6 AWG) conductor for 60-70A feeder circuits. Used for HVAC equipment, larger sub-feeders, and generator load circuits. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and pulling of THHN 22mm² (4 AWG) conductor for 80-100A feeder circuits and main branch panel feeds. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and pulling of THHN 38mm² (2 AWG) conductor for 100-125A feeder circuits and service entrance conductors. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of XLPE-insulated 3-core 50mm² power cable for main distribution circuits. Used from transformer to main panel. Measured per linear meter including terminations.

Supply and installation of 3-phase 30A panelboard (MLO type — main lug only) with branch circuit breakers. Includes load center, breakers, and wiring. Measured per set; used as branch panel fed from upstream MDP.
Supply and installation of 3-phase 60A panelboard for subfeed distribution or lighting panel. Includes main breaker, branch breakers, and trim. Measured per set.
Supply and installation of 400A main distribution panel (MDP) as primary service entrance panel. Includes main breaker, busbars, and feeder breakers. Measured per set.
Supply and installation of 50 KVA distribution transformer (single or three phase). Includes transformer, mounting, primary and secondary connections. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 100 KVA distribution transformer for larger building service. Measured per unit; includes oil-type or dry-type transformer and protective enclosure.
Supply and installation of individual IP camera for CCTV surveillance system. Includes camera, mounting bracket, and cable run to NVR. Measured per camera unit.
Supply and installation of NVR (network video recorder), monitor, and CCTV monitoring station. Includes NVR, UPS, monitor, and software licensing. Measured per set.
Supply and installation of individual speaker point for public address or sound reinforcement system. Includes speaker, volume control, and wiring. Measured per speaker unit.
Supply and installation of complete fire detection and alarm system including control panel, detectors, manual call points, bells, and wiring. Compliant with NFPA 72. Measured per lot.
Supply and installation of 400A automatic transfer switch (ATS) for changeover between utility and generator power. Includes ATS panel, control wiring, and commissioning. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 100 kW diesel generator set with radiator, base fuel tank, and battery starting system. Includes synchronizing panel for parallel operation. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 250 kW diesel generator set for larger facility backup power. Includes acoustic enclosure, fuel tank, and ATS interface wiring. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 2x2 LED panel light recessed in grid ceiling. Includes LED driver, panel, and wiring to switch. Measured per fixture unit.
Supply and installation of LED high-bay light fixture for warehouse or industrial ceilings. Includes fixture, pendant mount, and wiring. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of outdoor LED floodlight on pole or wall bracket. Includes fixture, photocell, and wiring. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of lightning protection system including air terminal (lightning rod), down conductors, and grounding electrode. Compliant with IEC 62305. Measured per lot.
Supply and installation of copper grounding rod (5/8" x 8') driven into ground and connected to grounding system. Includes copper rod, clamp, and #4 AWG ground conductor. Measured per ground rod.
Supply and installation of uninterruptible power supply (UPS) unit for critical equipment. Includes UPS, battery, and wiring. Capacity and runtime per equipment schedule. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of rooftop solar PV system including panels, inverter, mounting structure, and grid-tie connection. Measured per kilowatt-peak (kWp) of installed panel capacity.
Supply and installation of cable tray system including tray, cover, fittings, and hangers. Used for organized routing of multiple power and signal cables. Measured per linear meter of tray.
Supply and installation of motor control center (MCC) including incoming circuit breaker, motor starters, and control wiring. Used to centralize motor control for pumps and fans. Measured per set.
Supply and installation of wiring devices including receptacles, switches, and cover plates. Includes device, box, and wiring connection. Measured per device unit.
Supply and installation of busbar duct (busway) for high-current power distribution without individual cables. Measured per linear meter; used in switchroom and riser applications above 800A.

Supply and installation of medium-voltage switchgear equipment for substation including switchboards, VCBs, and metering cubicles. Measured per lot; requires coordination with MERALCO or local utility.
Supply and installation of 100mm diameter Series 1000 PVC drainage pipe with solvent-welded joints. Used for soil and waste branch pipes from fixtures. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 150mm PVC drainage pipe for main stack and horizontal sub-mains. Handles higher flow from multiple fixture branches. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 200mm PVC drainage pipe for main building sewer connection. Used for high-flow drain headers and connections to septic system. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 150mm HDPE corrugated drainage pipe for buried underground applications. More flexible than PVC; suitable for areas with soil movement. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of stainless steel linear drain channel for wet areas and food-processing floors. Includes channel body, slotted grate cover, and outlet fitting. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 25mm PPR (polypropylene random) pipe for hot and cold water supply. Butt-fusion welded joints; more resistant to scale than GI. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 50mm Schedule 40 GI (galvanized iron) pipe for cold water supply main lines. Threaded and coupled joints; heavy-duty for higher pressures. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 75mm Schedule 40 GI pipe for building water supply mains or fire water headers. Measured per linear meter; used where high flow capacity is required.
Supply and installation of 25mm uPVC pressure pipe for cold water supply in residential and light commercial applications. Cheaper than PPR; solvent-welded joints. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 50mm uPVC pressure pipe for distribution mains within buildings. Used for potable water systems not requiring hot water. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 50mm uPVC pipe for process fluid distribution in non-food applications. Includes fittings and supports; chemical-resistant. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 100mm uPVC process pipe for higher-flow process systems. Includes flanged or solvent-welded fittings as specified. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of 2-chamber concrete septic tank for primary sewage treatment. Includes RC construction, inlet/outlet fittings, and manhole access. Measured per unit; capacity per number of users.

Construction of 3-chamber concrete septic tank for improved effluent quality. Third chamber provides additional settlement. Measured per unit; used for larger occupancies or stricter effluent standards.

Supply and installation of packaged biodigester or biofilter system for sewage treatment. Prefabricated unit; provides biological treatment of wastewater. Measured per unit; appropriate for areas without public sewer.
Supply and installation of floor-mounted water closet (WC) including pan, cistern, seat cover, and flush valve. Includes roughing-in connection to drain. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of countertop lavatory (washbasin) with faucet, P-trap, and drain connection. Includes vessel or undermount basin and mixer. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of wall-hung urinal with flush valve and drain connection. Includes roughing-in and carrier fitting. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of shower set including valve, arm, and showerhead. Includes rough-in and finished trim. Measured per set.
Supply and installation of stainless steel utility sink with faucet and drain. Used in service areas, laboratories, and housekeeping rooms. Measured per unit.
Construction of concrete grease trap for kitchen drainage interceptor. Includes RC box, baffle partition, and cover. Measured per unit; capacity based on kitchen equipment.
Supply and installation of precast or prefabricated grease interceptor unit. Factory-made HDPE or concrete; easier to install than cast-in-place. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of wet-pipe fire sprinkler system including pipes, fittings, sprinkler heads, and hanger supports. Measured per square meter of covered floor area.
Supply and installation of fire standpipe system including risers, hose valves, cabinets, and siamese connections. Used for fire department hose connection. Measured per lot.
Supply and installation of outdoor fire hydrant complete with globe valve, hydrant body, and connection to water main. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 1.5 HP inverter split-type air conditioner (wall-mounted indoor unit and outdoor condenser). Includes refrigerant piping, drain, and wiring. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 2.5 HP split-type air conditioner. Higher cooling capacity for larger rooms; same installation scope as smaller units. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 2.5 HP cassette-type air conditioner with 4-way discharge ceiling unit. Provides more uniform air distribution than wall-mounted type. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of chiller and air handling unit (AHU) system for central air conditioning. Measured per ton of refrigeration (TR); includes chiller, AHU, chilled water piping, and controls.
Supply and installation of fan coil unit (FCU) connected to chilled water system. Includes unit, chilled water connections, condensate drain, and thermostat. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of ceiling-mounted exhaust fan for toilet and utility rooms. Includes fan, duct connection, and wall/ceiling cap. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of industrial wall-mounted exhaust fan for warehouses and production areas. Includes fan, louver shutter, and wiring. Measured per unit.

Supply and installation of refrigeration system for cold storage including condensing unit, evaporator coil, piping, and controls. Measured per ton of refrigeration (TR); designed for storage temperature of -18°C to +5°C.

Supply and installation of evaporative cooling system for poultry or agricultural buildings. Includes cooling pads, water distribution, and fans. Measured per lot; effective in the Philippine climate.
Supply and installation of booster water pump with pressure tank and automatic pressure switch. Maintains water pressure in multi-story buildings. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of polyethylene (PE) water storage tank on frame or ground support. Includes tank, inlet, outlet, and overflow fittings. Measured per unit; capacity in liters specified.
Supply and installation of electric water heater (storage type) for domestic hot water supply. Includes heater, inlet/outlet connections, and TPR valve. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of commercial-grade stainless steel sink with multiple compartments for commercial kitchen. Includes sink, faucet, and drain connection. Measured per unit.
Application of masonry neutralizer or etch primer on new concrete or CHB surfaces prior to painting. Neutralizes alkalinity and improves paint adhesion. Measured per square meter.
Application of 2 coats acrylic latex paint on interior masonry walls. Includes surface preparation (sanding, patching) and 2 coats. Standard interior wall finish; measured per square meter.
Application of 2 coats weatherproof acrylic latex paint on exterior masonry surfaces. UV and moisture resistant; includes surface preparation and 2 coats. Measured per square meter.

Application of acrylic textured coating on exterior surfaces for decorative and protective finish. Provides coarser texture than standard paint; hides surface imperfections. Measured per square meter.

Application of 2-part epoxy floor paint in 2 coats on concrete floors. Includes surface preparation (grinding), primer, and epoxy topcoat. Used in garages, warehouses, and utility rooms. Measured per square meter.

Application of food-grade epoxy floor coating system in 4 coats on concrete. Includes epoxy primer, body coat, topcoat, and anti-slip aggregate. Required in food processing areas per FDA standards. Measured per square meter.
Application of elastomeric roof paint on G.I. or concrete roof surfaces. Flexible, waterproof, and UV-reflective; extends roof service life. Measured per square meter.
Application of anti-corrosion paint system on metal surfaces (beams, columns, pipes). Includes rust treatment, metal primer, and topcoat. Measured per square meter of metal surface.
Application of thermoplastic road marking on asphalt or concrete pavement. Hot-applied at 180°C; includes lane lines, crosswalks, and symbols. Measured per square meter of marking area.
Application of water-based traffic paint for road markings. Cold-applied by spray; faster than thermoplastic but less durable. Measured per square meter.
Application of penetrating concrete sealer/densifier on polished concrete floors. Hardens surface, reduces dusting, and improves abrasion resistance. Measured per square meter.

Application of intumescent fire-resistant paint on structural steel to achieve fire resistance rating. Expands under heat to insulate steel; rating of 60-120 minutes depending on coating thickness. Measured per square meter.
Application of 2-part polyurethane protective coating on exposed concrete or metal. Chemical and abrasion resistant; used in industrial and marine applications. Measured per square meter.
Application of aluminum paint on GI roof sheets or metal surfaces as heat-reflective and corrosion-protective coating. Measured per square meter; reduces heat absorption compared to plain GI.
Application of waterproof paint system in bathrooms and wet areas. Includes anti-fungal primer and waterproof topcoat. Measured per square meter of wet wall area.

Supply and installation of 300x300mm ceramic floor tile with adhesive mortar and grout. Includes substrate preparation, setting bed, and tile installation. Used in residential and light commercial floors. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 400x400mm ceramic floor tile. Larger format than 1703(1); fewer grout joints. Includes adhesive setting and grouting. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 600x600mm polished granite floor tile with cement adhesive. Provides premium stone finish; highly durable and stain-resistant. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 600x600mm marble floor tile. Natural stone requiring honed finish and regular sealing. Used in lobbies and prestige areas. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 250x375mm ceramic wall tile in bathrooms and wet areas. Includes adhesive, grout, and edge trim. Standard bathroom wall tile size. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 300x600mm homogeneous (through-body) wall tile. Larger format; longer vertical joints. More durable than regular ceramic. Measured per square meter.

description: Gypsum Board Ceiling (9mm on Metal Grid)
detailed_description: Supply and installation of 9mm gypsum board ceiling on metal hat channel grid suspended from slab. Includes framing, board, jointing tape, and skim coat. Standard commercial ceiling finish. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of 12.5mm gypsum board partition on metal stud framing. Includes studs at 400mm c/c, board both sides, and taping. Standard lightweight partition system. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of exposed T-bar metal grid ceiling with removable tiles. Provides access to plenum above. Standard system in offices and commercial spaces. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of 600x600mm acoustic mineral fiber ceiling tile in T-bar grid. Provides sound absorption (NRC 0.55-0.70). Used in offices, conference rooms, and classrooms. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 300x300mm vinyl composite tile (VCT) on concrete floor with adhesive. Economical hard-wearing flooring for offices and light commercial. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of luxury vinyl plank (LVP) flooring with click-lock installation. Waterproof core; simulates wood appearance. Used in offices and retail. Measured per square meter.

Application of 10mm thick epoxy screed floor system. Self-leveling or broadcast finish; chemical-resistant and seamless. Used in laboratories, kitchens, and industrial areas. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 600x600mm homogeneous unpolished tile on floor. Matte surface provides better slip resistance than polished. Used in wet areas and corridors. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 600x1200mm large-format homogeneous tile. Fewer grout lines; modern appearance. Requires flat substrate. Measured per square meter.
Application of 12mm cement-sand plaster (1:3 mix) on interior masonry walls. Includes surface preparation, screeding, and float finish. Base layer for paint or tile. Measured per square meter.
Application of exterior cement plaster with skim finish coat. Includes rough coat and finishing coat; weather-resistant surface. Measured per square meter.

Application of putty skim coat on plaster or concrete surface to achieve smooth, paint-ready finish. Includes filling pinholes and imperfections; sanded smooth before painting. Measured per square meter.

Application of metallic aggregate floor hardener on fresh concrete while still plastic. Increases surface abrasion resistance 2-3 times versus plain concrete. Used in warehouses and factories. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of rubber tile flooring for sports halls, gyms, and playgrounds. Shock-absorbing; available in varied thickness and color. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of anti-static conductive epoxy floor system for electronics assembly rooms and server areas. Dissipates static charge to ground. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of fiber cement board (e.g., Hardiflex) as exterior wall cladding on frame. Includes primed boards, battens, and sealant at joints. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of calcium silicate board ceiling. Fire-resistant (Class A); moisture-resistant. Used in wet areas, external soffits, and fire-rated ceilings. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of rubber or PVC cove base molding at floor-wall junction. Provides hygienic, waterproof transition. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of SS304 stainless steel wall cladding panels for food processing and kitchen areas. Hygienic, easy to clean; meets food safety standards. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of acoustic foam panels on walls or ceiling for sound absorption and echo reduction. Used in recording studios and meeting rooms. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of glass or ceramic mosaic tile (20x20mm or 50x50mm modules on mesh backing). Used for decorative walls, pool linings, and feature areas. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of bamboo plank flooring. Eco-friendly hardwood alternative; similar hardness to oak. Click or nail installation. Measured per square meter.

Construction of 2.4m high concrete hollow block perimeter fence with CHB wall, reinforced concrete posts, and concrete footing. Standard site enclosure for industrial and commercial properties. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of perimeter fence using precast concrete panels on driven or cast concrete posts. Faster installation than CHB; panels set between posts. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 2.4m high chain link fence with GI wire mesh on GI pipe posts with concrete footings. Economic perimeter fencing for large sites. Measured per linear meter.

description: Chain Link Fence 1.8m with Barbed Wire
detailed_description: Supply and installation of 1.8m high chain link fence with 3 strands of barbed wire on top. Security enhancement over basic chain link. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of 150mm thick reinforced concrete pavement for parking areas. Includes subbase, reinforcement, concrete, and joint sealing. Measured per square meter.
Construction of 200mm thick reinforced concrete pavement for internal access roads. Heavier than parking pavement to accommodate delivery trucks. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 60mm thick concrete interlocking paving blocks (ICPB) on sand bedding. Used for pedestrian areas and light vehicle access. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 80mm thick heavy-duty ICPB for areas subject to forklift or truck traffic. Greater thickness than standard 60mm. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of grass sod, shrubs, and ground cover plants on graded soil. Includes topsoil preparation, planting, and initial watering. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of drip irrigation system for landscape areas. Includes mainline, emitters, and programmable controller. Measured per square meter of irrigated area.
Excavation, laying of utility pipes/conduits, and backfilling of 300mm wide underground utility trench. Includes excavation, sand bedding, and compacted backfill. Measured per linear meter of trench.
Excavation, laying of utilities, and backfilling of 600mm wide underground utility trench for larger pipes or multiple utilities. Includes same scope as 1806(1). Measured per linear meter.
Construction of precast or cast-in-place U-type concrete drain channel along site roads and buildings. Includes bedding, concrete channel, and grating cover. Measured per linear meter.
Construction of 600x600mm Type A concrete catch basin with grate cover for site stormwater collection. Includes RC box, inlet, and pipe connection. Measured per unit.
Construction of 900x900mm Type B concrete catch basin for higher flow areas. Larger than Type A; used at road low points and major drainage junctions. Measured per unit.
Construction of 600mm diameter Type A concrete manhole with precast rings, frame, and cover. Access point for underground drainage system. Measured per unit; depth affects cost.
Construction of 900mm diameter Type B concrete manhole for larger sewer or storm drain systems. Larger opening allows easier maintenance access. Measured per unit.
