Supply and installation of precast concrete Jersey-type road barrier for traffic separation and vehicle containment. Includes setting and alignment. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 6m steel flag pole with halyard, pulley, and concrete base. Includes primer and finish paint. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of building identification signage, directional signs, and wayfinding system. Includes sign panels, frames, and installation. Measured per lot.
Supply and installation of prefabricated or modular guard house at building entrance. Includes structure, electrical, and air conditioning. Measured per square meter.
Construction of reinforced concrete retaining wall for site grade changes. Includes footing, wall stem, and waterproofing. Measured per cubic meter of concrete in wall.
Supply and installation of outdoor concrete or metal benches, tables, and landscape furniture. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of bicycle rack for building entry or parking areas. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of rubber or plastic speed bump on internal roads. Measured per unit including anchor bolts.

description: Long Span Corrugated GI Sheet (0.5mm BMT)
detailed_description: Supply and installation of long span corrugated G.I. roofing sheet at 0.5mm BMT. Includes purlins, screws, and ridge caps. Economy-grade roofing for light industrial and residential. Measured per square meter.

description: Long Span Corrugated GI Sheet (0.6mm BMT)
detailed_description: Supply and installation of long span corrugated G.I. roofing sheet at 0.6mm BMT. Heavier gauge than 1901(1); greater resistance to wind uplift and denting. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of pre-painted rib-type metal roofing sheet (e.g., Rib-Span or equivalent). Pre-coated for weather resistance; more attractive than plain GI. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of standing seam pre-painted metal roofing for low-slope applications. Concealed fasteners; superior water resistance. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of insulated metal roof panel with 50mm PIR (polyisocyanurate) core between steel skins. R-value approximately 3.5. Used for cold storage and temperature-controlled warehouses. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of insulated metal roof panel with 100mm PIR core. R-value approximately 7.0; used for refrigerated or freezer storage applications requiring higher insulation. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 6mm clear polycarbonate corrugated roofing sheet for natural daylighting. UV-resistant coating; provides diffused light. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of twin-wall 10mm polycarbonate sheet for better insulation and diffused lighting. Lower U-value than single-layer sheet; used for large daylighting areas. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of G.I. ridge roll and hip cap over roof apex and hipped corners. Provides weatherproof seal at roof ridge. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of G.I. step flashings and counter-flashings at wall-roof junctions, skylights, and penetrations. Waterproofing critical detail. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 150x100mm pre-painted G.I. rectangular gutter fixed to fascia for roof rainwater collection. Includes expansion joints and brackets. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of stainless steel gutter for corrosive environments or high-quality installations. Includes fittings and outlets. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 100mm PVC downspout from gutter to stormwater connection. Includes pipe, elbows, straps, and shoe. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of 100mm pre-painted G.I. round downspout. Used where PVC downspout appearance is not acceptable. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of fiber cement board fascia. Smooth finish; paintable and rot-resistant. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of anodized aluminum fascia board. Premium finish; maintenance-free. Measured per linear meter.
Supply and installation of Z-type steel purlins at 2.0mm BMT as secondary roof framing spanning between roof trusses or frames. Includes purlins, bridging, and anti-sag rods. Measured per kilogram.
Supply and installation of C-type steel purlins at 2.5mm BMT. Heavier gauge than Z-type; used for longer spans or heavier roof loads. Measured per kilogram.

Fabrication and erection of steel rafters and roof trusses including chord members, web members, and connections. Includes shop fabrication, primer, transport, and crane erection. Measured per kilogram.
Fabrication and installation of knee braces and cross-bracing in roof structure for lateral stability and wind resistance. Measured per kilogram of steel.
Supply and installation of polycarbonate dome skylight on prefabricated aluminum curb. Provides natural daylighting. Measured per unit; dome size specified.
Supply and installation of continuous ridge vent skylight for natural daylighting and ventilation along roof ridge. Measured per linear meter of ridge vent.
Supply and installation of turbine roof ventilator at ridge for passive ventilation. Spins in wind to extract hot air. Measured per unit; size based on ventilated area.
Supply and installation of 2-hour fire-rated wall panel for fire separation walls. Tested per ASTM E119; rated assembly. Measured per square meter.

Supply and installation of 100mm thick PIR insulated cold room wall panel with pre-painted steel skins. Used for cold storage room construction including freezer and chiller rooms. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of 150mm thick PIR insulated cold room ceiling panel. Thicker than wall panel for greater heat gain protection from roof. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of insulated cold room swing door with cam-lift hinges and magnetic gasket seal. Includes heater strip to prevent gasket freezing. Measured per unit.
Supply and installation of 1.2m diameter wall-mounted industrial fan for warehouse ventilation. Includes fan, louver, and motor. Measured per unit.

Supply and installation of manual roll-up door (galvanized steel curtain) for warehouse or factory openings. Includes spring counterbalance, guides, and padlock. Measured per square meter of door opening.

Supply and installation of motorized roll-up door with electric motor, limit switches, and remote control handset. Includes all components of manual version plus motor drive. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of fiber cement soffit board under roof overhang. Provides fire-resistant and moisture-resistant soffit finish. Measured per square meter.
Supply and installation of fiberglass batt insulation under roof sheets for thermal performance and condensation control. Includes batts and vapor barrier. Measured per square meter.
